buildCommand: if ! command -v flutter &> /dev/null; then git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git --depth 1 -b stable /opt/flutter && export PATH="$PATH:/opt/flutter/bin"; fi && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release --dart-define=GEMINI_API_KEY=$GEMINI_API_KEY

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com; worker-src 'self' blob:
